categories.title: Won't launch / crashes immediately
categories.description: Program fails to start or crashes within seconds of launching

categories.title: Launcher issues
categories.description: Problems with Steam, EA App, Epic Games, or Rockstar launchers

categories.title: Graphics problems
categories.description: Black screen, flickering, visual artifacts, or low frame rate

categories.title: Audio problems
categories.description: No sound, crackling, popping, or wrong output device

categories.title: Controller / input problems
categories.description: Controller not detected or buttons mapped incorrectly

categories.title: Install / dependency problems
categories.description: Missing .NET, VC++, DirectX, or Winetricks components

categories.title: Network / download problems
categories.description: Download timeouts, Steam stalls, or connection failures

categories.title: Performance / stability over time
categories.description: Stuttering, frame drops, or hangs after playing for a while
